text: Multi-parent aim support: Show all paths to an aim in list view
description:
Aims can support multiple parents (synergies). Graph view already shows this well.

List view needs enhancement:
- When viewing an aim with multiple supportedAims, show all paths
- "This aim supports: [Aim A] [Aim B] [Aim C]"
- Click to navigate to each parent path
- Visual indicator for multi-parent aims (badge/icon)

Already implemented in data model, just needs UI support.
